steps.title: Build the interval
steps.content: A margin of error of $0.2$ around the sample mean $10.83$ gives $$10.83-0.2=10.63$$ and $$10.83+0.2=11.03$$

steps.title: Interpret the interval
steps.content: The plausible values for the average weight are between $10.63$ and $11.03$ ounces.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A states this interval exactly, so A is correct.
